heading: (intro)
raw: Directed and co-written by Federico Fellini.
clean: Directed and co-written by Federico Fellini.

heading: Marcello Rubini
raw: [to Sylvia] You are everything... everything! You are the first woman on the first day of creation. You are mother, sister, lover, friend, angel, devil, earth, home.
clean: You are everything... everything! You are the first woman on the first day of creation. You are mother, sister, lover, friend, angel, devil, earth, home.

heading: Marcello Rubini
raw: [to Emma] A man who agrees to live like this is a finished man, he's nothing but a worm! I don't believe in your aggressive, sticky, maternal love! I don't want it, I have no use for it! This isn't love, it's brutalization!
clean: A man who agrees to live like this is a finished man, he's nothing but a worm! I don't believe in your aggressive, sticky, maternal love! I don't want it, I have no use for it! This isn't love, it's brutalization!

heading: Marcello Rubini
raw: I'm wasting time. I won't manage anything anymore. Once I had ambitions, but maybe I'm losing everything. I forgot everything.
clean: I'm wasting time. I won't manage anything anymore. Once I had ambitions, but maybe I'm losing everything. I forgot everything.

heading: Steiner
raw: Don't be like me. Salvation doesn't lie within four walls. I'm too serious to be an amateur, but not enough to be a professional. Even the most miserable life is better than a sheltered existence in an organized society where everything is calculated and perfected.
clean: Don't be like me. Salvation doesn't lie within four walls. I'm too serious to be an amateur, but not enough to be a professional. Even the most miserable life is better than a sheltered existence in an organized society where everything is calculated and perfected.

heading: Steiner
raw: We must get beyond passions, like a great work of art. In such miraculous harmony. We should love each other outside of time... detached.
clean: We must get beyond passions, like a great work of art. In such miraculous harmony. We should love each other outside of time... detached.

heading: Steiner
raw: [to Emma] The day you understand that you love Marcello more than he does, you'll be happy.
clean: The day you understand that you love Marcello more than he does, you'll be happy.

heading: Emma
raw: [to Paparazzo] How can you be this way? It's not possible to be like you! Hyenas! You're worse than hyenas! You don't respect anyone! You make me sick! Cowards!
clean: How can you be this way? It's not possible to be like you! Hyenas! You're worse than hyenas! You don't respect anyone! You make me sick! Cowards!

heading: Emma
raw: Come home, I'll make Ravioli! I want to make love!
clean: Come home, I'll make Ravioli! I want to make love!

heading: Laura
raw: [to Marcello] Stay free, available, like me. Never get married. Never choose. Even in love, it's better to be chosen.
clean: Stay free, available, like me. Never get married. Never choose. Even in love, it's better to be chosen.

heading: Iris Tree
raw: Le tre grandi evasioni -- fume, bere, letto. [The three great escapes—smoking, drinking, bed.]
clean: Le tre grandi evasioni -- fume, bere, letto.

heading: Iris Tree
raw: The great thing is to burn, and not to freeze.
clean: The great thing is to burn, and not to freeze.

heading: Iris Tree
raw: We must all think about tomorrow, but without forgetting to live today.
clean: We must all think about tomorrow, but without forgetting to live today.

heading: Other
raw: Transvestite: By 1965 there'll be total depravity. How squalid everything will be.
clean: By 1965 there'll be total depravity. How squalid everything will be.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Journalist: What do you think you like most in life?
clean: What do you think you like most in life?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Sylvia: I like lots of things. But there are three things I like most. Love, love and love.
clean: I like lots of things. But there are three things I like most. Love, love and love.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Journalist: How do you sleep, with pajamas or nightgown?
clean: How do you sleep, with pajamas or nightgown?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Sylvia: Neither. I sleep only in 2 drops of French perfume.
clean: Neither. I sleep only in 2 drops of French perfume.
